work.section-description: A selection of recent projects that showcase our approach to performance, design, and conversion-focused development.

project-1.title: Fervor Games
project-1.description: A mobile-first web presence for an indie game development studio. Built for speed and engagement, the site reflects the brand's energy while delivering a seamless experience across all devices.

project-2.title: Portfolio Website
project-2.description: A clean, conversion-focused portfolio site for a creative professional. Designed to communicate credibility and drive inquiries, with a lighthouse score above 98 and sub-second load times.

process.section-description: See exactly how we work with clients from first contact to a high-performing, conversion-optimized website. This roadmap shows each step so you know what to expect and how we ensure results.

step-1.title: Free Consultation
step-1.description: Talk to one of our experts about your website, goals, and conversion challenges. We’ll show you opportunities for growth before you spend a single dime.

step-2.title: Audit & Analysis
step-2.description: Most redesigns fail to improve conversions. We analyze your site using scientific web design principles, evaluating usability, performance, and conversion potential. Only after we know what works, we make changes.

step-3.title: Design & Development
step-3.description: We create a fast, conversion-optimized website, implementing only changes proven to increase conversions through A/B testing and user behavior analysis.

step-4.title: Launch & Grow
step-4.description: Your site goes live, but the work doesn’t stop. We track results, optimize designs based on data, and continually improve conversions so your website keeps generating revenue.

about.title: We Build Websites That Work
about.description: Fervor Web is a small web agency focused on building high-performance, conversion-optimized websites for small businesses, startups, and creators.

information.title: Where It All Started
information.description: Fervor Web started as a conceptual website for a small boutique web agency specializing in high-performance websites for small businesses for a Web Design Class project in 2026. It still is exactly that. We build customer-centric websites focused on high performance, conversion rate, and SEO, all delivered quickly and maintained affordably through a straightforward subscription model. Too many businesses invest in a website that looks good but fails to convert visitors into customers. Fervor Web combines technical excellence, scientific design principles, and a focus on measurable results. We are a small but dedicated team, and we treat every project as if it were our own business.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: These aren't words on a wall. They're the principles that guide every decision we make.

results.title: Results Are the Only Metric That Matters
results.description: We measure success by one thing: did your business grow? Every decision, every pixel, every line of code is evaluated against that standard.

detail.title: Obsessive Attention to Detail
detail.description: The difference between good and exceptional lives in the details. We sweat the small things because our clients' customers notice them even when they don't.

honesty.title: Honest Advice, Always
honesty.description: We tell clients what they need to hear, not what they want to hear. We treat every client's business as if it were our own.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Is Non-Negotiable
accessibility.description: Great websites work for everyone — regardless of ability, device, or connection speed. We build with inclusion as a baseline, not an afterthought.

partnerships.title: Long-Term Partnerships Over Quick Wins
partnerships.description: We're not interested in one-off projects. We want to be the team you call when your business grows, pivots, or needs to level up.

reputation.title: We Earn Our Reputation With Every Project
reputation.description: Our real product isn't websites — it's the results our clients achieve and the stories they tell about working with us.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: A small team with a big focus on results.

member-1.name: Hristo Hristov
member-1.description: Hristo is a software engineering student at the University of Ruse who's been building games since he was a 8 years old, one of which has racked up over 26 million visits. These days he splits his time between game development and web work, with a focus on conversion rate optimization and performance, building high-performance websites using modern frameworks and methods. His experience combines deep technical skills and strong eye for design.

member-2.name: Ricks
member-2.description: Meet Rix, Fervor Web's resident quality assurance specialist. A competitive programmer of pupil rank on Codeforces, he brings a sharp eye for detail and an unmatched ability to sit still under pressure. When he's not reviewing code, he can be found lying down on the job, which boosts the team's morale and motivation significantly.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.description: This privacy policy will explain how our organization uses the personal data we collect from you when you use our website.

section1.title: What data do we collect?
section1.description: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number, website address) submitted through our contact form.

section2.title: How do we collect your data?
section2.description: You directly provide Fervor Web with all data we collect. We collect data when you voluntarily complete and submit the contact form on our website.

section3.title: How will we use your data?
section3.description: Fervor Web collects your data so that we can respond to your enquiry and discuss potential projects with you. We do not share your data with any third parties.

section4.title: How do we store your data?
section4.description: Contact form submissions are sent directly to our email and are not stored in any database. We will retain your contact information only for as long as is necessary to handle your enquiry.

section5.title: Marketing
section5.description: Fervor Web does not send marketing emails and does not share your data with any partner companies for marketing purposes.

section6.title: What are your data protection rights?

access.title: The right to access
access.definition: You have the right to request copies of your personal data.

rectification.title: The right to rectification
rectification.definition: You have the right to request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate or incomplete.

erasure.title: The right to erasure
erasure.definition: You have the right to request that we erase your personal data.

restrict-processing.title: The right to restrict processing
restrict-processing.definition: You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data.

object-processing.title: The right to object to processing
object-processing.definition: You have the right to object to our processing of your personal data.

portability.title: The right to data portability
portability.definition: You have the right to request that we transfer your data to another organization or directly to you.

section6.contact: If you make a request, we have one month to respond. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at

section7.title: Cookies & Local Storage
section7.description: We use your browser's local storage to remember your preferred language and theme (light or dark mode) between visits. This data is stored only on your device and is never shared with third parties. You can clear it at any time through your browser settings, which will reset your preferences to their defaults.

section8.title: Privacy policies of other websites
section8.description: Our website contains links to other websites, including client project links. Our privacy policy applies only to this website. If you follow a link to another website, please read their privacy policy.

section9.title: Changes to our privacy policy
section9.description: Fervor Web keeps this privacy policy under regular review. Any updates will be posted on this page.

section10.title: How to contact us
section10.address: Address: z.k. Zdravets Sever-1, 12 Rodopi Street, 7005 Ruse. Bulgaria

section11.title: How to contact the appropriate authority
section11.description: Should you wish to report a complaint or if you feel we have not addressed your concern satisfactorily, you may contact the Commission for Personal Data Protection (CPDP) of Bulgaria.
section11.address: Address: 2 Prof. Tsvetal Lazarov boulevard, 1592 Sofia, Bulgaria

cookie-consent.title: We use cookies
cookie-consent.body: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website. For more information on how we use cookies, please see our cookie policy.
cookie-consent.accept-note: By clicking <bold>Accept</bold>, you agree to our use of cookies.
cookie-consent.minimal-body: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience.

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.body: By accessing or using the Fervor Web website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

services.title: 2. Services
services.body: Fervor Web provides web design, development, consultation, and audit services. The details, scope, and pricing of any services provided to a client will be agreed upon separately in writing before work begins. These terms govern your use of our website only and do not constitute a service agreement.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and code — excluding linked third-party and client websites — is the property of Fervor Web and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any such content without our prior written consent.

client-work.title: 4. Client Work
client-work.body: Project showcases and client work displayed on this website are shown with the permission of the respective clients. All intellectual property rights for client projects remain with the client upon full payment, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: Fervor Web will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or our services. Our total liability for any claim arising from our services shall not exceed the amount paid by the client for the specific service in question.

links.title: 6. External Links
links.body: Our website contains links to third-party websites, including client projects. These links are provided for reference only. Fervor Web has no control over the content of those sites and accepts no responsibility for them or for any loss or damage that may arise from your use of them.

law.title: 7. Governing Law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Bulgaria. Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Ruse, Bulgaria.

changes.title: 8. Changes to These Terms
changes.body: Fervor Web reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Your continued use of the website after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.intro: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us:
contact.address: Address: z.k. Zdravets Sever-1, 12 Rodopi Street, 7005 Ruse. Bulgaria
